items.title: VGT And XLK: Time To Cut Exposure To These Large ETFs
items.description: VGT And XLK have soared, but both are highly concentrated in a few mega-cap tech stocks. Click here to see why the funds are a Sell.

items.title: MAGY: Seek Exposure For Mag 7, But Caution Is Warranted
items.description: Roundhill Magnificent Seven Covered Call ETF offers high weekly income by writing covered calls on mega-cap tech stocks via its MAGS ETF holding. See why MAGY is a Hold.

items.title: Apple's Satellite-Powered Features for iPhones: A Journey Spanning Over A Decade
items.description: Apple continues to make strides in its decade-old satellite connectivity project. The tech giant is reportedly developing a range of innovative features to enhance its satellite services.

items.title: Can Apple Shares Surge Past $300 This Year?
items.description: Shares of Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) have been making up for lost time in the year’s second half, now up more than 26% in the last three months, putting the iPhone maker up just shy of 11% year to date.
